---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Curriculum Vitae — Davide Rolfi"
---

# Curriculum Vitae

<p class="page-intro">
My full academic CV is available below. It includes details on my education, research, teaching experience, academic service, funding, technical skills, and selected academic activities.
</p>

<div class="cv-panel">

<div class="cv-panel-text">
<h3>Academic CV (PDF)</h3>
<p>Complete PDF version of my academic CV.</p>
</div>

<div class="cv-panel-action">
<a class="btn btn-primary" href="files/CV_Davide.pdf">Download CV</a>
</div>

</div>
